hero.description: Aggregate WallHaven, 4K Wall, MotionBGs, and more, with macOS desktop slot management for one-click setup across Spaces.

search.title: Smart Search
search.desc: Keywords, tags, categories, purity filter with live preview. Find your wallpaper in seconds.

dynamic.title: Dynamic Wallpapers
dynamic.desc: MotionBGs video library integration. One-click dynamic desktop background.

sync.title: Rule Sync
sync.desc: Auto-sync parsing rules via GitHub. No manual maintenance when sources update.

download.title: Batch Download
download.desc: Original / 2K / 4K / 8K quality options. Save favorites locally in one click.

custom.title: Custom Extensions
custom.desc: Open rule system supporting any image/video source.

slots.title: Desktop Slots
slots.desc: Keep separate wallpapers for macOS Desktop 1, Desktop 2, and beyond, with automatic slot matching when Spaces change.

wallhaven.name: WallHaven
wallhaven.desc: World's largest HD static wallpaper community, massive 4K/8K collection

slots.name: Desktop Slots
slots.desc: Separate wallpaper state for multiple macOS desktops

cta.title: Ready to Refresh Your Desktop?
cta.subtitle: Download for free and start a new experience.
